properties./Dataset_Description: This dataset may facilitate the differentiation, based on imaging biomarkers, between prostatic cancer and hyperplasia. In addition, it could allow for the extraction of radiomic features from MRI-identifiable lesions and their correlation to Gleason score (GS).

properties.entity:FamilyMemberHistory2:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"FamilyMemberHistory2_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"FamilyMemberHistory2_Relationship" AS RelationshipEUCAIM,
		"Family Cancer History - Father.Relationship" AS RelationshipOriginal,
		"FamilyMemberHistory2_ConditionCode" AS ConditionCodeEUCAIM,
		"Family Cancer History - Father.Condition Code" AS ConditionCodeOriginal,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:FamilyMemberHistory1:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"FamilyMemberHistory1_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"FamilyMemberHistory1_Relationship" AS RelationshipEUCAIM,
		"Family Cancer History - Mother.Relationship" AS RelationshipOriginal,
		"FamilyMemberHistory1_ConditionCode" AS ConditionCodeEUCAIM,
		"Family Cancer History - Mother.Condition Code" AS ConditionCodeOriginal,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping SurgicalProcedure_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Treatment: surgery.Code' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Treatment: surgery.Code" AS originalValue,
		'SurgicalProcedure_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:FamilyMemberHistory3:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"FamilyMemberHistory3_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"FamilyMemberHistory3_Relationship" AS RelationshipEUCAIM,
		"Family History - PSA.Relationship" AS RelationshipOriginal,
		"FamilyMemberHistory3_ConditionCode" AS ConditionCodeEUCAIM,
		"Family History - PSA.Condition Code" AS ConditionCodeOriginal,

FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Patient:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Gender / Sex" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp

properties.entity:TumorMarkerTest1:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" || '_marker_1' AS Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS	PrimaryCancerIdentifier,
		"PSA (ng/ml).Code" AS TumorMarkerOriginal, 
		"TumorMarkerTest_Code" AS TumorMarkerEUCAIM,
		"TumorMarkerTest_ResultValueAsNumber" AS ValueAsConcept,
		"TumorMarkerTest_ResultValueUnit" AS ValueAsConceptUnit,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

properties.entity:Tumor:
SELECT 	"Tumor_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Tumor_BodySiteLateralityQualifier" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierEUCAIM,
		"Topography : Laterality" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySiteLocationQualifier" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierEUCAIM,
		"Topography : Region (Peripheral zone:PZ - Transitional zone: TZ - Cental Zone: CZ - Fibromuscular stroma: FS)" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierOriginal,
		1 AS Episode,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:SurgicalProcedure1:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"SurgicalProcedure_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	TreatmentIdentifier,
        "SurgicalProcedure_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate,
        "SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS ProcedureEUCAIM,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Procedure1_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Imaging procedure (MRI  CT  MRI+CT)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Imaging procedure (MRI  CT  MRI+CT)" AS originalValue,
		'Procedure1_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Procedure1_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:ImagingProcedure1:
SELECT 	"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Procedure1_ProcedureIdentifier" As ProcedureIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		 1 as ImagingTimepoint,
		"Procedure1_Code" AS ImagingProcedureEUCAIM,
		"Imaging procedure (MRI  CT  MRI+CT)" AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		1 as Episode,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySiteLocationQualifier:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Topography : Region (Peripheral zone:PZ - Transitional zone: TZ - Cental Zone: CZ - Fibromuscular stroma: FS)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Topography : Region (Peripheral zone:PZ - Transitional zone: TZ - Cental Zone: CZ - Fibromuscular stroma: FS)" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySiteLocationQualifier' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySiteLocationQualifier" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_DiagnosticCategory:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Population' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Population" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_DiagnosticCategory' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:PrimaryCancerCondition:
SELECT 	"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mappping Tumor_BodySiteLateralityQualifi:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Topography : Laterality' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Topography : Laterality" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySiteLateralityQualifier' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySiteLateralityQualifier" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping HistologicalGrade_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Gleason Score.Code' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Gleason Score.Code" AS originalValue,
		'HistologicalGrade1_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "HistologicalGrade1_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Title" AS	Title,
		"Dataset_Description" AS Description,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Episode1:
SELECT 	"Episode1_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Episode1_Type" AS TypeOriginal,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

properties.log_message: Reading curated csv from staging and applying structural mapping

labels.label:
Loop 03 for clinical data (UoA prostate dataset):
* Clinical data input normalized and curated is loaded and converted to a relational model.
* Specific mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
Steps:
1. Read normalized and curated csv file and apply structural mapping preparation
2. Apply lookups for coded values
3. Write values transformed to EUCAIM CDM and hyperontology to ingestion database
